Character-model.description: Configure Oh My Lite OpenAgent character role models from the OpenCode TUI.
Character-model.template: Configure per-role models for Oh My Lite OpenAgent. First call bounded_lite_model_config with action=list. Show the current role model map and available provider models. Ask the user which roles to update. When the user chooses, call bounded_lite_model_config with action=apply and assignments as an object whose keys are role names and values are provider/model ids. Preserve unrelated OpenCode config.

build.description: Disabled built-in OpenCode build mode; use command-lead.

plan.description: Disabled built-in OpenCode plan mode; use plan-builder or power-plan-builder.

command-lead.description: Main orchestrator for execution work with approval and state ownership.

plan-builder.description: Visible planner with explicit discussion mode for user-facing planning and internal normalize mode for stable skeleton convergence.

power-plan-builder.description: Visible deep planner that only expands a stable skeleton into an execution blueprint.

task-lead.description: Single-task orchestrator for bounded local complexity with max depth one.

explore.description: Read-only local exploration of files, structure, and code context.

librarian.description: External documentation and OSS reference lookup with no edit authority.

review.description: Review specialist that evaluates plans and execution outputs without silent rewrite.
